case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. M BRIDGET DUBRIWNY et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DUBRIWNY, M BRIDGET
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DUBRIWNY, M BRIDGET
